description: Fix SDK misuse in E2E test plugin: use SDK exports (removeLocalStorage, removeSessionStorage, log) instead of inline reimplementations, and use ToolError factory methods with custom codes instead of the raw constructor. Remove stale comments referencing SDK v0.0.16.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Use SDK removeLocalStorage/removeSessionStorage exports in sdk-remove-storage tool
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the E2E test plugin to use SDK storage removal exports so that it stays consistent with SDK behavior changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool imports removeLocalStorage from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk
Tool imports removeSessionStorage from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk
Tool uses removeLocalStorage(params.key) for storageType === 'local'
Tool uses removeSessionStorage(params.key) for storageType === 'session'
The stale comment block about 'published SDK (v0.0.16)' is removed
The inline try/catch block around localStorage.removeItem/sessionStorage.removeItem is removed
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run format:check passes

userStories.title: Use SDK log export in log-levels tool instead of globalThis.__openTabs.log
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the E2E test plugin to use the SDK's public log API so that the tool doesn't break if internal runtime details change.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool imports log from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk
The SdkLog interface is removed
The getSdkLog() helper function is removed
The stale comment block about 'older published versions' is removed
The handle function uses the imported log directly (log.debug, log.info, log.warn, log.error)
The ok: false early-return path when getSdkLog() returns undefined is removed
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File: plugins/e2e-test/src/tools/log-levels.ts

Current code defines a SdkLog interface (lines 11-16) and getSdkLog() helper (lines 18-21) that reads from globalThis.__openTabs.log. The stale comment at lines 6-10 says this avoids importing log directly because older SDK versions might not export it.

The SDK exports log at platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.ts line 348:
  export { log } from './log.js';

Fix: Import log from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk. Remove the SdkLog interface, getSdkLog helper, and the stale JSDoc comment. In the handle function, use log.debug/info/warn/error directly instead of going through getSdkLog(). Since log is always available (it's a frozen object exported by the SDK), remove the null check and the ok:false early return.

userStories.title: Use SDK ToolError factory methods with custom codes in error-custom-code tool
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the E2E test plugin to demonstrate the SDK's factory methods with custom codes so that it serves as a correct reference implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'auth' case uses ToolError.auth('Custom auth error', 'CUSTOM_AUTH')
The 'not_found' case uses ToolError.notFound('Custom not found', 'CUSTOM_NOT_FOUND') (already correct)
The 'rate_limited' case uses ToolError.rateLimited('Custom rate limit', 3000, 'CUSTOM_RATE_LIMIT')
The 'validation' case uses ToolError.validation('Custom validation', 'CUSTOM_VALIDATION')
The 'timeout' case uses ToolError.timeout('Custom timeout', 'CUSTOM_TIMEOUT')
The 'internal' case uses ToolError.internal('Custom internal', 'CUSTOM_INTERNAL')
The stale comment about 'published SDK (v0.0.16)' is removed
Error metadata (category, retryable, retryAfterMs) is identical before and after — verified by checking the factory method signatures in platform/plugin-sdk/src/errors.ts
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File: plugins/e2e-test/src/tools/error-custom-code.ts

Current code uses `new ToolError(msg, code, opts)` constructor for 5 of 6 cases (lines 26-52). The stale comment at lines 8-10 says 'The published SDK (v0.0.16) only supports custom codes on notFound()'.

All factory methods in platform/plugin-sdk/src/errors.ts now accept an optional code parameter:
  - static auth(message: string, code?: string): ToolError
  - static notFound(message: string, code?: string): ToolError  
  - static rateLimited(message: string, retryAfterMs?: number, code?: string): ToolError
  - static validation(message: string, code?: string): ToolError
  - static timeout(message: string, code?: string): ToolError
  - static internal(message: string, code?: string): ToolError

Fix: Replace each constructor call with the corresponding factory method. Key mappings:
  - new ToolError('Custom auth error', 'CUSTOM_AUTH', { category: 'auth', retryable: false }) → ToolError.auth('Custom auth error', 'CUSTOM_AUTH')
  - new ToolError('Custom rate limit', 'CUSTOM_RATE_LIMIT', { category: 'rate_limit', retryable: true, retryAfterMs: 3000 }) → ToolError.rateLimited('Custom rate limit', 3000, 'CUSTOM_RATE_LIMIT')
  - new ToolError('Custom validation', 'CUSTOM_VALIDATION', { category: 'validation', retryable: false }) → ToolError.validation('Custom validation', 'CUSTOM_VALIDATION')
  - new ToolError('Custom timeout', 'CUSTOM_TIMEOUT', { category: 'timeout', retryable: true }) → ToolError.timeout('Custom timeout', 'CUSTOM_TIMEOUT')
  - new ToolError('Custom internal', 'CUSTOM_INTERNAL', { category: 'internal', retryable: false }) → ToolError.internal('Custom internal', 'CUSTOM_INTERNAL')

Remove the stale JSDoc comment block.
